title: dendrorkis caduca
side_effects: Dendrorkis caduca can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like hives and itching. In severe cases, prolonged use can lead to liver damage and kidney problems. Some people may also experience dizziness and lightheadedness, particularly when consuming large quantities or combining it with other medications. Additionally, improper preparation or dosage can cause headaches and fatigue in individuals who are sensitive to its properties.
